subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of Paradise! Bear thou witness in thine inmost being that verily there is no God but Him, and that 'Alí before Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه الفردوس ان اشهدی فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو و ان علیا قبل محمد
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @importance of prayer, @spiritual transformation
